seo.title: Wink for Hotels | Direct Booking at 5.5% All-In
seo.metaDescription: Sell direct at 5.5% all-in vs 15-25% on OTAs. Stripe included, no setup or monthly fee. Website, social, WinkLinks and partners on one Booking Engine.
seo.ogTitle: Wink for Hotels | Own Your Direct Demand
seo.ogDescription: Control supply, create bookable content, activate partner demand, and convert bookings through a hotel-branded path.

content.summary: Sell direct at 5.5% all-in vs 15-25% on OTAs. Stripe included, no setup or monthly fee. Website, social, WinkLinks and partners on one Booking Engine.

fields.lead: Sell direct at 5.5% all-in vs 15-25% on OTAs. Stripe included, no setup or monthly fee. Website, social, WinkLinks and partners on one Booking Engine.

fields.heading: Own your direct demand.
fields.body: Sell direct at 5.5% all-in vs 15-25% on OTAs. Stripe included, no setup or monthly fee. Website, social, WinkLinks and partners on one Booking Engine.

fields.heading: Choose the next step that fits your role.
fields.body: Sell direct at 5.5% all-in vs 15-25% on OTAs. Stripe included, no setup or monthly fee. Website, social, WinkLinks and partners on one Booking Engine.

cards.title: OTA commission drains margin.
cards.body: A booking that could have come direct can cost 15-25% when it returns through an OTA.

cards.title: The guest relationship gets interrupted.
cards.body: Too much data, remarketing, and repeat-stay value sits between the hotel and the guest.

cards.title: Social traffic is hard to convert.
cards.body: Instagram posts, Facebook content, WhatsApp, email, and QR campaigns need a bookable path.

cards.title: Partners need rules.
cards.body: Partners can sell your hotel only when inventory, pricing, commission, and attribution are clear.

cards.title: Create
cards.body: Use WinkSocial and Studio to generate hotel-native content for rooms, F&B, spa, experiences, packages, and seasonal moments.

cards.title: Distribute
cards.body: Turn inventory into Social Links, Web Components, maps, grids, cards, and partner-ready assets.

cards.title: Convert
cards.body: Use WinkLinks and hotel-owned pages to turn social, QR, email, partner, and campaign traffic into bookable demand.

cards.title: Fulfill
cards.body: Use Booking Engine to complete rooms, packages, add-ons, spa, F&B, and experiences in one Stripe-powered checkout.

cards.title: Earn
cards.body: Use channel reporting, partner attribution, and payout logic to see what drove the booking.

items.question: What is Wink for hotels?
items.answer: Wink is a hotel commerce platform that helps hotels sell direct through their website, social channels, WinkLinks, partner channels, and the Booking Engine while keeping the booking path connected to the hotel brand and guest relationship.

items.question: Is Wink an OTA?
items.answer: No. Wink is the infrastructure hotels use to create, distribute, convert, and fulfill direct demand without handing the guest relationship back to an OTA.

items.question: How does Wink compare with OTA commission?
items.answer: Wink source materials describe 5.5% all-in on direct bookings with Stripe gateway included. OTAs commonly charge 15-25%, and they often keep the hotel at a distance from the guest relationship.

items.question: Can I sell more than rooms?
items.answer: Yes. The Booking Engine is designed to support rooms, packages, add-ons, F&B, spa, experiences, and other hotel inventory in one checkout path.

items.question: Do I need a channel manager?
items.answer: No. Hotels can connect a channel manager where available or manage rates, availability, and inventory manually in Extranet.

items.question: Where does Traveliko fit for hotels?
items.answer: Traveliko is a product-stack channel layer inside Wink. It is explained as a hotel-controlled sales and discovery channel, not as a separate homepage audience path.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
